falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows would invalidate the 80% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, proving this is not a similar bottoming structure but rather a breakdown to new lows

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme fear readings above the August 2024 peak VIX of ~28 would show panic escalation inconsistent with a bottom formation, indicating the blowoff score of 40 underestimated selling pressure and the HOLD signal was wrong

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% while S&P 500 simultaneously drops more than 5% from current levels
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a recessionary flight-to-quality dynamic rather than a growth-scare bottom, invalidating the bottom pattern match which occurred without concurrent recessionary bond pricing

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
